description_long: This infant bed is constructed primarily from wood, featuring a rectangular frame with four sturdy, square corner posts. The sides and ends are composed of evenly spaced vertical slats, providing both ventilation and visibility while ensuring safety for an infant inside. The base of the bed supports a flat, light-colored mattress or sleeping surface, which is recessed below the top rails. The design is simple and functional, with no visible wheels, casters, or ornate decorations, emphasizing practicality and stability. The slatted guard rails on all sides act as protective barriers to prevent an infant from falling out. The overall finish is matte, with a warm reddish-brown wood tone dominating the exterior.
description: A wooden infant bed with slatted sides, four square posts, and a recessed light-colored mattress. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional, with protective guard rails on all sides.
description_view_0: The bed is seen from above and slightly to the side, clearly showing the slatted sides, four posts, and the light-colored mattress inside.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the length of the bed and the parallel slats along both long sides, with the posts at each corner visible.
description_view_2: A straight-on side view, emphasizing the vertical slats and the solid, blocky posts at each end.
description_view_3: The opposite angled view, showing the other end of the bed and the consistent slatted design on all sides.
